quotes.text: The best time to launch is when you have something that works. The worst time is when you think it's perfect.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to add Stripe is before you launch. You'd be amazed how many people don't launch because they can't figure out payments.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to launch on Product Hunt is when you have a product people want to tell their friends about.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to launch on Indie Hackers is when you have a working product and a story to tell.
quotes.author: based
